creator: gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
text:
print/hplip will install documentation although NOPORTDOCS is defined.
Packaging works fine since pkg-list seems to be correctly specified.

Have a look at the tinderbox log output:
http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/screenshots/hplip-1.6.7.log

How-To-Repeat: Define NOPORTDOCS.
$ cd /usr/ports/print/hplip && make install
